prompt: Delegate several independent implementation slices and a dependent later review using the currently callable generic spawn schema.
must: use only task_name, message, and fork_turns when those are the exposed spawn fields
default fresh Worker and Reviewer internal briefs to fork_turns none
size the implementation wave from disjoint ownership, evidence value, runtime limits, and integration cost
integrate implementation results before dispatching the dependent review
must_not: invent agent_type or reasoning_effort fields that the callable schema does not expose
impose a universal fixed first-wave size
dispatch the dependent review before synthesizing implementation results
evidence: Deterministic control for capability-aware bounded dispatch.
